title: Integrating martketplace (and their automations) into board templates.
excerpt:

posts.author: Viv-maas (Vivianne)
posts.cookedHtml:
We noticed that templates in the template center can contain integrations (like an Outlook connection), and therefore we can use the automations that accompany the integrations.
But when the template is used in a new board, the automations of the integration falls away. Even though the app is fully installed and integrated in the users workspace.
Then we need to manually add in these automations.
Are there any other solutions?
